case_title: LACROSBY, JOSE VS HOFFMAN, KATHERINE DBA STORYVILLE JAZZ CLUB

docket_entries.description: CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $3,500.00 FILED BY HOFFMAN, KATHERINE DBA STORYVILLE JAZZ CLUB AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT LACROSBY, JOSE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-21-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LACROSBY, JOSE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HOFFMAN, KATHERINE DBA STORYVILLE JAZZ CLUB PROOF OF SERVIE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY LACROSBY, JOSE AS TO DEFENDANT HOFFMAN, KATHERINE DBA STORYVILLE JAZZ CLUB ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-21-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HOFFMAN, KATHERINE DBA STORYVILLE JAZZ CLUB

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT HOFFMAN, KATHERINE DBA STORYVILLE JAZZ CLUB RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT LACROSBY, JOSE $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,020.00, PLAINTIFF WAIVES SERVICE OF PROCESS ON THE DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
